description: A nutritious and quick salad made with bulgur, chickpeas, cherry tomatoes, red onion, and basil.
ingredients: [{"name": "Bulgur", "units": "cup", "amount": 1}, {"name": "Water", "units": "cups", "amount": 2}, {"name": "Honey", "units": "tablespoons", "amount": 2}, {"name": "Nuts", "units": null, "amount": "a handful"}, {"name": "Canned Chickpeas", "units": "can", "amount": 1}, {"name": "Cherry Tomatoes", "units": "cup", "amount": 1}, {"name": "Red Onion", "units": null, "amount": 1}, {"name": "Basil", "units": null, "amount": "to taste"}, {"name": "Olive Oil", "units": null, "amount": "to taste"}, {"name": "Vinegar", "units": null, "amount": "to taste"}, {"name": "Salt", "units": null, "amount": "to taste"}]
instructions: 1. Cook bulgur according to package instructions. 2. Mix cooked bulgur with canned chickpeas, cherry tomatoes, red onion, and basil. 3. Add dressing made from olive oil, vinegar, and salt.
notes: You can add other vegetables or proteins as desired.
